modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: PDF attachments in Outlook turn into links instead of files.

full_description_text:  
So, the user is trying to send a PDF via email. But every time they attach it, it just turns into a link. They’re using Outlook 365 on Windows 10/11. It’s kinda frustrating, right?
short_description: PDF attachments in Outlook turn into links instead of files.
description: So, the user is trying to send a PDF via email. But every time they attach it, it just turns into a link. They’re using Outlook 365 on Windows 10/11. It’s kinda frustrating, right?
